data.content:
All **195 tests pass**. Here's a summary of the test project:

| Test File | Tests | Coverage Area |
|-----------|-------|---------------|
| `Models/PersonTests` | 6 | `FullName`, property accessors |
| `Models/StudentTests` | 5 | Inheritance, enrollments, dates |
| `Models/InstructorTests` | 5 | Inheritance, office/course assignments |
| `Models/CourseTests` | 8 | Properties, navigation properties |
| `Models/DepartmentTests` | 9 | Budget, nullable FK, row version |
| `Models/EnrollmentTests` | 8 | Grade enum, navigation properties |
| `Models/NotificationTests` | 12 | All properties, `EntityOperation` enum |
| `Models/ErrorViewModelTests` | 4 | `ShowRequestId` logic |
| `Services/NotificationServiceTests` | 12 | Send/receive, FIFO, message generation |
| `Controllers/StudentsControllerTests` | 24 | CRUD, sort, search, pagination, validation |
| `Controllers/CoursesControllerTests` | 17 | CRUD, image upload validation |
| `Controllers/DepartmentsControllerTests` | 14 | CRUD, concurrency path |
| `Controllers/InstructorsControllerTests` | 16 | CRUD, course assignments, dept admin cleanup |
| `Controllers/HomeControllerTests` | 6 | Index, About grouping, Contact, Error |
| `Controllers/NotificationsControllerTests` | 4 | JSON endpoints, mark-as-read |
| `PaginatedListTests` | 13 | Paging, boundaries, empty source |
| `SchoolContextTests` | 10 | EF In-Memory CRUD, DbSets, keys |
| `DbInitializerTests` | 7 | Seed data, idempotency |

The tests use **EF Core In-Memory** for database isolation and **Moq** for `IWebHostEnvironment`/`ILogger` in the courses controller. Each test class creates a fresh database context via `Guid`-named databases to avoid cross-test interference.
